name: xyzzy
perform: var loc = room.id; if (loc === 'room:inside-building') return { output: '', events: lib.teleport(loc, 'room:in-debris-room') }; if (loc === 'room:in-debris-room') return { output: '', events: lib.teleport(loc, 'room:inside-building') }; return lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: plugh
perform: var loc = room.id; if (loc === 'room:inside-building') return { output: '', events: lib.teleport(loc, 'room:at-y2') }; if (loc === 'room:at-y2') return { output: '', events: lib.teleport(loc, 'room:inside-building') }; return lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: plover
perform: var loc = room.id; var events = []; var emerald = lib.tryGet('item:emerald'); if (emerald && emerald.location === player.id) { events.push(lib.moveTo('item:emerald', { to: loc, description: 'Emerald dropped by plover magic' })); } if (loc === 'room:at-y2') { events.push(...lib.teleport(loc, 'room:in-plover-room')); return { output: '', events: events }; } if (loc === 'room:in-plover-room') { events.push(...lib.teleport(loc, 'room:at-y2')); return { output: '', events: events }; } return lib.result('Nothing happens.');

name: fee
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 0) { lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 1 }); return lib.result('Ok.');

name: fie
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 1) { lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 2 }); return lib.result('Ok.');

name: foe
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); if (count !== 2) { lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); return lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); } lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 3 }); return lib.result('Ok.');

name: foo
perform: var count = (player.properties['feeCount'] || 0); lib.setProperty(player.id, { name: 'feeCount', value: 0 }); if (count !== 3) return lib.result('Get it right, dummy!'); var eggs = lib.tryGet('item:eggs'); if (!eggs) return lib.result('Nothing happens.'); if (eggs.location === 'room:in-giant-room') return lib.result('Nothing happens.'); var events = [lib.moveTo('item:eggs', { to: 'room:in-giant-room', description: 'Golden eggs returned to Giant Room by magic' })]; if (room.id === 'room:in-giant-room') return { output: 'A large nest full of golden eggs suddenly appears out of nowhere!', events: events }; return { output: 'Done!', events: events };

name: old-magic
perform: return lib.result('Good try, but that is an old worn-out magic word.');

name: catch-bird
perform: if (!object) return lib.result('Catch what?'); if (object.location === 'item:cage') return lib.result('You already have the little bird. If you take it out of the cage it will likely fly away from you.'); var cage = lib.tryGet('item:cage'); if (!cage || cage.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You can catch the bird, but you cannot carry it.'); var rod = lib.tryGet('item:rod'); if (rod && rod.location === player.id) return lib.result('The bird was unafraid when you entered, but as you approach it becomes disturbed and you cannot catch it.'); return { output: 'You catch the bird in the wicker cage.', events: [lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: 'item:cage', description: 'Bird caught in cage' }), lib.setProp('item:cage', { property: 'open', value: false, description: 'Cage closed' })] };

name: release-bird
perform: var events = [lib.setProp('item:cage', { property: 'open', value: true, description: 'Cage opened' }), lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: room.id, description: 'Bird released' })]; var snake = lib.tryGet('item:snake'); if (snake && snake.location === room.id) { events.push(lib.moveTo('item:snake', { to: 'void', description: 'Snake driven away by bird' })); return { output: 'The little bird attacks the green snake, and in an astounding flurry drives the snake away.', events: events }; } var dragon = lib.tryGet('item:dragon'); if (dragon && dragon.location === room.id) { events.push(lib.moveTo('item:bird', { to: 'void', description: 'Bird killed by dragon' })); return { output: 'The little bird attacks the green dragon, and in an astounding flurry gets burnt to a cinder. The ashes blow away.', events: events }; } return { output: 'The little bird flies free.', events: events };

name: water-plant
perform: var bottle = lib.tryGet('item:bottle'); if (!bottle || bottle.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You have nothing to water the plant with.'); var water = lib.tryGet('item:water'); if (!water || water.location !== 'item:bottle') return lib.result('The bottle is empty.'); var plant = lib.get('item:plant'); var size = plant.properties['plantSize'] || 'tiny'; var events = [lib.moveTo('item:water', { to: 'void', description: 'Water used' })]; if (size === 'tiny') { events.push(lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'tall', description: 'Plant grew to tall' })); return { output: 'The plant spurts into furious growth for a few seconds.', events: events }; } if (size === 'tall') { events.push(lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'huge', description: 'Plant grew to huge' })); return { output: 'The plant grows explosively, almost filling the bottom of the pit.', events: events }; } events.push(lib.setProp('item:plant', { property: 'plantSize', value: 'tiny', description: 'Plant shriveled' })); return { output: "You've over-watered the plant! It's shriveling up! It's, it's...", events: events };

name: attack-dragon
perform: var dragon = lib.get('item:dragon'); if (dragon.properties['questioning'] === true) return lib.result('You already asked. Answer yes or no.'); return { output: 'With what? Your bare hands?', events: [lib.setProp('item:dragon', { property: 'questioning', value: true, description: 'Dragon asked about bare hands' })] };

name: say-yes
check: var dragon = lib.tryGet('item:dragon'); return dragon && dragon.properties['questioning'] === true;
perform: return { output: "Congratulations! You have just vanquished a dragon with your bare hands! (Unbelievable, isn't it?)", events: [lib.moveTo('item:dragon', { to: 'void', description: 'Dragon vanquished' }), lib.setProp('item:dragon', { property: 'questioning', value: false, description: 'Dragon no longer questioning' })] };

name: feed-bear
perform: return { output: 'The bear eagerly wolfs down your food, after which he seems to calm down considerably and even becomes rather friendly.', events: [lib.moveTo('item:food', { to: 'void', description: 'Food eaten by bear' }), lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'friendly', value: true, description: 'Bear is now friendly' })] };

name: give-troll
perform: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return lib.result('Give what?'); if (!object.tags.includes('treasure')) return lib.result('The troll deftly catches the ' + lib.ref(object) + ', examines it carefully, and tosses it back, declaring, "Good workmanship, but it\'s not valuable enough."'); return { output: 'The troll catches your treasure and scurries away out of sight.', events: [lib.moveTo(object.id, { to: 'void', description: 'Treasure given to troll' }), lib.moveTo('item:troll', { to: 'void', description: 'Troll leaves' }), lib.setProp('item:troll', { property: 'treasured', value: true, description: 'Troll paid' })] };

name: take-bear
perform: var bear = lib.get('item:bear'); if (bear.properties['friendly'] !== true) return lib.result("Surely you're joking!"); var chain = lib.tryGet('item:chain'); if (chain && chain.properties['locked'] === true) return lib.result('The bear is still chained to the wall.'); return { output: "Ok, the bear's now following you around.", events: [lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'following', value: true, description: 'Bear following player' })] };

name: drop-bear
perform: var events = [lib.setProp('item:bear', { property: 'following', value: false, description: 'Bear stopped following' }), lib.moveTo('item:bear', { to: room.id, description: 'Bear released' })]; var troll = lib.tryGet('item:troll'); if (troll && troll.location === room.id) { events.push(lib.moveTo('item:troll', { to: 'void', description: 'Troll scared by bear' })); events.push(lib.setProp('item:troll', { property: 'alive', value: false, description: 'Troll killed' })); return { output: 'The bear lumbers toward the troll, who lets out a startled shriek and scurries away. The bear soon gives up the pursuit and wanders back.', events: events }; } return { output: 'The bear wanders away from you.', events: events };

name: [tick]-bear-follow
check: var bear = lib.tryGet('item:bear'); return bear && bear.properties['following'] === true && bear.location !== room.id;
perform: return { output: 'The bear lumbers along behind you.', events: [lib.moveTo('item:bear', { to: room.id, description: 'Bear follows player' })] };

name: [tick]-lantern
check: var lantern = lib.tryGet('item:lantern'); return lantern && lantern.properties['switchedOn'] === true;
perform: var lantern = lib.get('item:lantern'); var power = (lantern.properties['powerRemaining'] || 0); var newPower = power - 1; var events = [lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'powerRemaining', value: newPower, description: 'Lantern power drained' })]; if (newPower <= 0) { events.push(lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'switchedOn', value: false, description: 'Lantern died' })); events.push(lib.setProp('item:lantern', { property: 'lit', value: false, description: 'Lantern no longer lit' })); return { output: 'Your lamp has run out of power.', events: events }; } if (newPower === 30) return { output: 'Your lamp is getting dim.', events: events }; return { output: '', events: events };

name: wave-rod
perform: var eastBank = 'room:on-east-bank-of-fissure'; var westSide = 'room:west-side-of-fissure'; var bridgeExists = lib.has('exit:fissure-bridge:west'); if (bridgeExists) { var bw = lib.get('exit:fissure-bridge:west'); bw.location = 'void'; var be = lib.get('exit:fissure-bridge:east'); be.location = 'void'; return lib.result('The crystal bridge has vanished!'); } if (!lib.has('exit:fissure-bridge:west')) { lib.createEntity('exit:fissure-bridge:west', { tags: ['exit'], properties: { location: eastBank, direction: 'west', destination: westSide } }); lib.createEntity('exit:fissure-bridge:east', { tags: ['exit'], properties: { location: westSide, direction: 'east', destination: eastBank } }); } else { lib.get('exit:fissure-bridge:west').location = eastBank; lib.get('exit:fissure-bridge:east').location = westSide; } return lib.result('A crystal bridge now spans the fissure.');

name: [tick]-treasure-take
perform: var carried = lib.carried(); var events = []; for (var i = 0; i < carried.length; i++) { var item = carried[i]; if (!item.tags.includes('treasure')) continue; if (item.properties['scored_take'] === true) continue; lib.setProperty(item.id, { name: 'scored_take', value: true }); lib.addScore(5); events.push(lib.scoreEvent(5, 'Took ' + lib.ref(item))); if (item.properties['scored_found'] !== true) { lib.setProperty(item.id, { name: 'scored_found', value: true }); lib.addScore(2); events.push(lib.scoreEvent(2, 'Found ' + lib.ref(item))); } } return { output: '', events: events };

name: drop-treasure-building
perform: if (command.form !== 'transitive') return lib.result('Drop what?'); var deposit = (object.properties['depositPoints'] || 10); var ref = lib.ref(object); lib.addScore(deposit); return { output: 'Safely deposited.', events: [lib.moveTo(object.id, { to: room.id, description: 'Deposited ' + ref }), lib.scoreEvent(deposit, 'Deposited ' + ref)] };

name: [tick]-cave-closing-check
check: if (player.properties['caveClosing'] === true) return false; if (player.properties['caveClosed'] === true) return false; var treasures = lib.findByTag('treasure'); return treasures.every(function(t) { return t.properties['scored_found'] === true; });
perform: var events = [lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosing', value: true, description: 'Cave is closing' }), lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'closingCountdown', value: 25, description: '25 turns until cave closes' }), lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 25), description: 'Bonus for finding all treasures' })]; var toRemove = ['npc:dwarf', 'item:troll', 'item:dragon', 'item:bear']; for (var i = 0; i < toRemove.length; i++) { if (lib.has(toRemove[i])) events.push(lib.moveTo(toRemove[i], { to: 'void', description: 'Removed for cave closing' })); } if (lib.has('door:grate:down')) { events.push(lib.setProp('door:grate:down', { property: 'locked', value: true, description: 'Grate locked' })); events.push(lib.setProp('door:grate:up', { property: 'locked', value: true, description: 'Grate locked' })); } if (lib.has('npc:dwarf')) events.push(lib.setProp('npc:dwarf', { property: 'remaining', value: 0, description: 'No more dwarves' })); if (lib.has('npc:pirate')) events.push(lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: 'Pirate retired' })); return { output: 'A sepulchral voice reverberating through the cave says, "Cave closing soon. All adventurers exit immediately through main office."', events: events };

name: [tick]-cave-closing-countdown
perform: var countdown = (player.properties['closingCountdown'] || 0); var newCount = countdown - 1; if (newCount > 0) return { output: '', events: [lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'closingCountdown', value: newCount, description: newCount + ' turns until cave closes' })] }; var events = [lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosed', value: true, description: 'Cave is closed' }), lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'caveClosing', value: false, description: 'Closing phase ended' }), lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 10), description: 'Bonus for reaching endgame' }), lib.moveTo(player.id, { to: 'room:at-ne-end', description: 'Teleported to repository' })]; var itemsToNE = ['item:bottle', 'item:lantern']; var itemsToSW = ['item:bird', 'item:pillow']; for (var i = 0; i < itemsToNE.length; i++) { if (lib.has(itemsToNE[i])) events.push(lib.moveTo(itemsToNE[i], { to: 'room:at-ne-end', description: 'Moved to repository' })); } for (var i = 0; i < itemsToSW.length; i++) { if (lib.has(itemsToSW[i])) events.push(lib.moveTo(itemsToSW[i], { to: 'room:at-sw-end', description: 'Moved to repository' })); } return { output: 'The sepulchral voice intones, "The cave is now closed." As the echoes fade, there is a blinding flash of light (and a small puff of orange smoke). . .\n\nAs your eyes refocus, you look around...', events: events };

name: blast
perform:
var loc = room.id; if (loc !== 'room:at-sw-end' && loc !== 'room:at-ne-end') return lib.result('I see no dynamite here.'); var rod = lib.tryGet('item:rod-mark'); var rodLoc = rod ? rod.location : null; if (loc === 'room:at-sw-end' && rodLoc === 'room:at-ne-end') { var score = ((player.properties['score'] || 0) + 35); return { output: 'There is a loud explosion, and a twenty-foot hole appears in the far wall, burying the dwarves in the rubble. You march through the hole and find yourself in the main office, where a cheering band of friendly elves carry the conquering adventurer off into the sunset.

*** You have won! ***

Final score: ' + score, events: [lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'score', value: score, description: 'Won the game!' }), lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'gameOver', value: true, description: 'Game won' })] }; } if (loc === 'room:at-ne-end' && rodLoc === 'room:at-sw-end') return lib.result('There is a loud explosion, and a twenty-foot hole appears in the far wall, burying the snakes in the rubble. A river of molten lava pours in through the hole, destroying everything in its path, including you!

You have died.'); return lib.result('There is a loud explosion, and you are suddenly splashed across the walls of the room.

You have died.');

name: [tick]-dwarf-movement
perform: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; var events = [];  if (dflag === 0) {   events.push(lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'dflag', value: 1, description: '' }));   return { output: '', events: events }; }  if (dflag === 1) {   events.push(lib.setProp(player.id, { property: 'dflag', value: 2, description: '' }));   events.push(lib.moveTo('item:axe', { to: room.id, description: '' }));   return { output: 'A little dwarf just walked around a corner, saw you, threw a little axe at you (which missed), cursed, and ran away.', events: events }; }  var dwarves = lib.findByTag('dwarf'); var output = [];  for (var i = 0; i < dwarves.length; i++) {   var dwarf = dwarves[i];   if (dwarf.properties['dead'] === true) continue;    var loc = dwarf.location;   if (loc === 'void') {     if (lib.odds(1, 15)) {       var dwarfishRooms = lib.findByTag('room').filter(function(r) { return r.tags.includes('dwarfish') && r.id !== room.id; });       if (dwarfishRooms.length > 0) {         var spawnRoom = lib.pick(dwarfishRooms);         if (spawnRoom) events.push(lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: spawnRoom.id, description: '' }));         events.push(lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'prevRoom', value: 'void', description: '' }));       }     }     continue;   }    var exits = lib.getExitDestinations(loc);   var prev = dwarf.properties['prevRoom'] || 'void';   var filtered = exits.filter(function(dest) { return dest !== prev; });   if (filtered.length === 0) filtered = exits;   if (filtered.length === 0) continue;    var dest;   if (filtered.indexOf(room.id) !== -1 && lib.chance(0.65)) {     dest = room.id;   } else {     dest = lib.pick(filtered);   }    if (!dest) continue;   events.push(lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'prevRoom', value: loc, description: '' }));   events.push(lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: dest, description: '' }));    if (dest === room.id) {     output.push('A threatening little dwarf comes out of the shadows!');   } }  return { output: output.join(' '), events: events };

name: [encounter]-dwarf
perform: if (command.form !== 'transitive') return { output: '', events: [] }; var dwarf = object; if (dwarf.properties['dead'] === true) return { output: '', events: [] }; if (room.id === 'room:in-mirror-canyon') return lib.result('The dwarf admires himself in the mirror.'); if (lib.chance(0.048)) return lib.result('The threatening little dwarf throws a nasty little knife at you, and it gets you!'); return lib.result('The threatening little dwarf throws a nasty little knife at you, but it misses!');

name: throw-axe-dwarf
perform: var dwarf = indirect; var events = [lib.moveTo('item:axe', { to: room.id, description: 'Axe lands in room' })]; if (lib.chance(0.667)) {   events.push(lib.setProp(dwarf.id, { property: 'dead', value: true, description: 'Dwarf killed' }));   events.push(lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: 'void', description: '' }));   return { output: 'You killed a little dwarf! The body vanishes in a cloud of greasy black smoke.', events: events }; } events.push(lib.moveTo(dwarf.id, { to: 'void', description: '' })); return { output: 'Missed! The little dwarf dodges out of the way of the axe.', events: events };

name: [tick]-pirate-movement
check: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; if (dflag < 2) return false; var pirate = lib.tryGet('npc:pirate'); if (!pirate) return false; if (pirate.properties['retired'] === true) return false; return pirate.location !== room.id && pirate.location !== 'void';
perform: var pirate = lib.get('npc:pirate'); var loc = pirate.location; var exits = lib.getExitDestinations(loc); if (exits.length === 0) return { output: '', events: [] }; var dest; if (exits.indexOf(room.id) !== -1 && lib.chance(0.15)) {   dest = room.id; } else {   dest = lib.pick(exits); } return { output: '', events: [lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: dest, description: '' })] };

name: [tick]-pirate
check: var dflag = player.properties['dflag'] || 0; if (dflag < 2) return false; var pirate = lib.tryGet('npc:pirate'); if (!pirate) return false; if (pirate.properties['retired'] === true) return false; return pirate.location === room.id;
perform: var pirate = lib.get('npc:pirate'); var events = []; var dwarves = lib.findByTag('dwarf').filter(function(d) { return d.location === room.id && d.properties['dead'] !== true; }); if (dwarves.length > 0) {   events.push(lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'void', description: '' }));   return { output: 'A bearded pirate appears, catches sight of the dwarf and runs away.', events: events }; } var carried = lib.carried(); var treasures = carried.filter(function(e) { return e.tags.includes('treasure'); }); if (treasures.length === 0) {   if (pirate.properties['spotted'] === true) return { output: '', events: [] };   events.push(lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'spotted', value: true, description: '' }));   events.push(lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: '' }));   events.push(lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' }));   return { output: 'There are faint rustling noises from the darkness behind you. As you turn toward them, you spot a bearded pirate. He is carrying a large chest. "Shiver me timbers!" he cries, "I\'ve been spotted! I\'d best hie meself off to the maze to hide me chest!" With that, he vanishes into the gloom.', events: events }; } events.push(lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'rich', value: true, description: '' })); if (pirate.properties['spotted'] === true) {   events.push(lib.setProp('npc:pirate', { property: 'retired', value: true, description: '' })); } for (var i = 0; i < treasures.length; i++) {   events.push(lib.moveTo(treasures[i].id, { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' })); } events.push(lib.moveTo('npc:pirate', { to: 'room:dead-end-13', description: '' })); return { output: 'Out from the shadows behind you pounces a bearded pirate! "Har, har," he chortles. "I\'ll just take all this booty and hide it away with me chest deep in the maze!" He snatches your treasure and vanishes into the gloom.', events: events };
